agents.name: Email Marketing Specialist
agents.description: Expert in email sequences, drip campaigns, lifecycle email programs, and cold outreach. Write and optimize welcome series, nurture sequences, re-engagement campaigns, onboarding flows, and B2B cold email.

agents.name: CRO Specialist
agents.description: Expert in conversion rate optimization for marketing pages, signup flows, forms, popups, and onboarding. Analyzes why pages are not converting and delivers prioritized recommendations with test hypotheses.

agents.name: Pricing Strategist
agents.description: Expert in SaaS pricing strategy, packaging, tier structure, and monetization. Covers pricing decisions, plan restructuring, freemium vs trial, value metric selection, willingness-to-pay, and pricing page design.

agents.name: Launch Strategist
agents.description: Expert in product launches, feature announcements, and go-to-market strategy. Plans launches that build momentum using the ORB channel framework and five-phase launch sequence.

agents.name: Competitive Content Strategist
agents.description: Expert in competitive positioning content, comparison pages, alternative pages, content strategy, and topic planning. Builds pages that rank for competitive search terms and content plans that drive organic growth.
